# INQUE \u2014 SALVIX Recovery Balm

Advanced biotech recovery balm for skin under trauma.

## Domain
www.inquerituals.com

## What It Is
SALVIX is a premium recovery balm at the intersection of tattoo culture, advanced skincare, and biotechnology. Created by INQUE.

## Key Features
- Barrier Repair \u2014 supports the skin's protective barrier during trauma
- Biotech Actives \u2014 advanced peptides and recovery-focused ingredients
- Hydration Architecture \u2014 multi-layer moisture support for stressed skin
- Recovery Focused \u2014 formulated for irritation, sensitivity, and healing

## Key Ingredients
Snail Mucin, Copper Peptides, Centella Asiatica, Ectoin, Panthenol, Ceramides

## For
Tattoo recovery, barrier damage, irritation and redness, post-procedure care

## Artist Program
Curated partnership for tattoo studios and recovery-focused professionals. Trial SALVIX and provide feedback.

## Contact
www.inquerituals.com
